name: American Odyssey
description: Traverse the four regions of the United States. Answer questions, complete tasks, and collect items to prove your knowledge of America across any era.

regions.name: Northeast
regions.description: From the rocky coasts of Maine to the urban corridors of the mid-Atlantic, the Northeast is where American history began.

regions.name: Southeast
regions.description: From the Appalachians to the Gulf Coast, the Southeast pulses with music, history, and rich cultural heritage.

regions.name: Central
regions.description: Heartland of America — the Great Plains, the Great Lakes, and the Mississippi River define a region of industry and agriculture.

regions.name: West
regions.description: From the Rockies to the Pacific, the West is defined by vast landscapes, innovation, and the spirit of the frontier.

winCondition: First team to reach proficiency in all 4 regions wins. Proficiency requires answering at least 3 questions correctly and completing 1 task per region.
